'''Guntar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zeetsa]] who worked for the criminal [[X'Ting]] [[Trillot]] and took charge of bringing the drugs to Trillot's customers in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[ChikatLik]]. When he brought some bad quality drugs to a pair of [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] consumers, Trillot ordered to have Guntar's olfactory organs removed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
